headline: Ibrahima Konaté — update
body: 🚨⚪️ OFFICIAL: Real Madrid confirm Ibrahima Konaté to join on four year deal. French defender arrives from Liverpool. 🇫🇷 https://t.co/pSLpHo0p9I
